column6:
This Easter, we celebrate more than just a season – we celebrate the journey. Every truck on the road, every delivery made, and every partnership forged is a testament to resilience, teamwork, and commitment. To our drivers, thank you for your dedication and for keeping our roads safe. To our customers and partners, thank you for trusting us to move your business forward.

May this season of renewal bring you energy, peace, and smooth journeys ahead. From all of us at UD Trucks Lichtenburg, we wish you a joyful and safe Easter.
column9:
Happy Easter from UD Trucks Lichtenburg!
Wishing all our drivers, partners, and customers safe roads, smooth journeys, and renewed energy this season.

Whether it’s heavy-duty mining, construction, long-haul transport, or refrigerated deliveries, the UD Quon rises to every challenge. Designed for South Africa’s toughest roads, it offers fuel-efficient engines, advanced safety systems, and a rugged build that keeps your business moving forward.

No matter your load or your route, the UD Quon delivers unmatched performance, reliability, and peace of mind. Stop by UD Trucks Lichtenburg today and discover how the Quon can elevate your fleet.

column6:
UD Trucks Euro 5 Technology uses SCR (Selective Catalytic Reduction) with AdBlue to dramatically reduce harmful emissions like NOx and particulates. It improves fuel efficiency, engine performance, and uptime, while lowering total cost of ownership. Real-time fuel coaching helps drivers maximize efficiency, making Euro 5 trucks both environmentally friendly and business-ready.

Learn more:
https://lichtenburg.udsa.co.za/euro-5/
